settings.subtitle: WE ARE
settings.title: DELIGHTED
settings.text:
to invite you to our family's farm days to enjoy our exciting tours. Visit us and learn what it takes to care for horses, cows, and chickens, and take a hay ride with us around the farm! This is a hands on and educational tour and we'd love to have you!

The cost of the tour is $15 a person. Children 1 and younger are free! The tours usually last about 90 minutes. 

Purchase tickets below
